$comment: Pinned anvil fork blocks per chain. Re-pin periodically; keep recent enough for the uni RPC gateway's archival depth. Runtime overrides: ANVIL_FORK_BLOCK (mainnet) / ANVIL_FORK_BLOCK_BASE (base). Read by anvil-args.ts, scripts/start-anvil.sh, and the CI RPC cache key in .github/actions/playwright_matrix_test.
